college_info.college_name: Suryadatta College of Hospitality Management and Travel Tourism

highlights.summary:
Established in 2004, Suryadatta College of Hospitality Management and Travel Tourism (also known as SCHMTT Pune) is one of the premier hotel management institutes and a constituent unit of Surya Group of Institutes. SCHMTT, along with 13 sister institutes, is run and managed by Surya Group in the field of Management, Travel and Tourism, Hotel Management, Media and Mass Communication, Interior Designing, Fashion and Jewellery Design, Event Management, Multimedia Graphics and Animation, Creative Arts, Aviation, Health and Fitness, Self-defense, Beauty and Wellness, Vocational and Advanced Studies. The institute is affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University (formerly known as University of Pune or University of Poona). SCHMTT Pune is approved by Directorate of Technical Education, Maharashtra (DTE) and recognised by Government of Maharashtra. The institute is also a study center for Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University (YCMOU). SCHMTT has been ranked 4 under 'Best Private Hotel Management Institute in Maharashtra' as per GHRDC Hotel Management Institute Survey 2019.

SCHMTT Pune offers Bachelor of Science (Hotel Management) in Hospitality Studies. In addition to the regular academics, SCHMTT also organises industry visits, seminars by hospitality professionals, theme lunches and food festivals for its students. This gives their students the latest knowledge of the industry and a hand-on experience in various spheres of hotel management. Campus facilities for students include well-equipped labs, a state-of-the-art campus, high-tech kitchen, a fine-dine restaurant, computer labs and a high-speed Wi-Fi facility for students so that the students and faculty remain connected all the time. The library offers access to a wide range of information sources that include 24,000+ regular text books reference books, 62 leading national and international journals, magazines, periodicals and subscription of six leading newspapers.

Below mentioned are some of the key facts about Suryadatta College of Hospitality Management and Travel Tourism, Pune:

Suryadatta College of Hospitality Management and Travel Tourism admission process is conducted in both online and offline mode. Admission is offered on first-cum-first-serve basis since seats offered at the institute are limited. The application process for all the programmes begin in the month of April every year. Students can download the admission form from the official website, take a print-out, fill it and send the form by post along with all the necessary documents. Candidates applying for all the programmes must ensure their eligibility criteria before applying for the programme.

Read More: SCHMTT Pune Admission Process

Suryadatta College of Hospitality Management and Travel Tourism Pune courses include BSc in Hotel Management under one specialisation, namely Hospitality Studies. The course duration of the programme is three years. The objective of BSc Hospitality Studies programme is to train the students to be efficient hospitality professionals. The programme is designed keeping in mind the needs of the industry for well-trained professionals who will be able to work as per the set standards.

Read more: SCHMTT Pune Courses

Under the Internal Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC), the placement cell of SCHMTT offers value-addition round the clock, besides rigorous academic sessions through industrial visits, guest lectures, seminars, and conferences. Extensive industry interface and management activities develop the required skill-set and industriousness in the students. Also, to make students conversant in diverse cultures, opportunities for internships and Summer Placements in Germany, Malaysia, Singapore, US, UK and other countries through various experts/agencies are also available. Students get placement offers based on their academics, communication skills, presentation skills and performance in the selection process. Names of the leading national and international hotel chains that were part of Suryadatta College of Hospitality Management and Travel Tourism placement process 2019 included:

Read more: SCHMTT Pune Placements

Suryadatta College of Hospitality Management and Travel Tourism believes in rewarding its meritorious and deserving students. SCHMTT Pune scholarships adhere to all the schemes offered and run at state level/national level by the Government of India and awards them to students depending upon their excellent academic record and financial status. It also abides by all the scholarship policies regulated by Suryadutta Group of Institutes and Savitribai Phule Pune University.

Read more: SCHMTT Pune Scholarships

individual_reviews.title: Campus life here is full of fun and learning.

content.Placements: The quality of placements in our college is very good. The E placement cell of our college is amazing. They provide various opportunities to students of every course. content.Infrastructure: It is an amazing college. It is comfortable and affordable for all the students. The courses offered by our college are very good. The fee structure is very simple.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Tourism Studies - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am extremely satisfied with faculty members, teaching and the college campus.

content.Placements: Our college gives us an open platform to choose our own choice of hotels for internships. They help us in choosing hotels abroad, and they also help us to contact with the consultants for abroad. They guide us properly for the internship. They also help us for 3rd-year placements, and top hotels are suggested for recruitments.
content.Infrastructure: We have 3 kitchens and a restaurant set-up in our college. The first kitchen is the basic training kitchen, the second is the quantity training kitchen, and the third is the advanced training kitchen. We have a restaurant where we practice F n B practicals. We have a library where all the books related to course are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality Studies - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: For placement or internships abroad they provide assured agents to help you throughout the process.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities offered by the college are based on your interest, academic performance, communication skills and overall self-presentation. individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality Studies - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: SCHMTT is the best college for a hotel management course.
